chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No.D-355 of 2019. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For hearing of main case. 27.03.2019. Mr. Badar Rajpar, Advocate a/w petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl: A.G. Mr. Asad Ali Jatoi, Advocate for the respondent No.6. === Through instant petition, petitioner seeks directions for issuance of Rule Nisi for production of detainee Mst. Uzma Phulpoto from Darul Aman, Qasimabad, Hyderabd. On directions of this Court, detainee Mst. Uzma has been produced from Darul Aman, whose statement has been recorded by ASI PS SITE, in which, she has stated that she has never been abducted by anyone and on her own accord she left the house of her parents to marry with Sadam Hussain, but she apprehended by Kotri police and thereafter she was sent to Darul Aman, Hyderabad by the concerned Magistrate. She does not wish to go with her mother, who is present in Court. Since the detainee Mst Uzma being sui juris intends to contract marry with one Saddam Hussain s/o Ghulam Sarwar Lashari with her free will and consent and does not want to go with her mother, who is petitioner in this matter. In the circumstances, she cannot be allowed to go with Saddam Hussain, as she is still not solemnized marriage with him, therefore, she is remanded back to Darul Aman, Qasimabad Hyderabad for further proceedings. In the above terms, petition stands disposed of. JUDGE. JUDGE. g
